feature: ReturnOrderBy3 - Order by multiple expressions (order obey priority of expressions)

scenarios.id: ReturnOrderBy3 - Order by multiple expressions (order obey priority of expressions)-[1] Sort on aggregate function and normal property
scenarios.description: [1] Sort on aggregate function and normal property
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)
RETURN n.division, count(*)
ORDER BY count(*) DESC, n.division ASC
